title: Amtech M1607 5 Piece wood jigsaw blade set (AMT101AO)
features: DURABLE: These wood jigsaw blades are made from high carbon steel and are designed for cutting softwood, plywood and laminated panels (1.5mm-15mm)
CURVED, CLEAN CUT: With a T-Shank fitting, they are 76mm in length and have 20 teeth per inch (TPI) to provide a fine, curved clean cut
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
